title: InvalidSession error message doesn't name the missing capability URI
description: In methods.rs every method builds the error with ClientError::InvalidSession("no chat account_id"). A contributor seeing this error at runtime has no idea where to look — the message doesn't say which JMAP capability URI is missing (urn:ietf:params:jmap:chat), doesn't reference primaryAccounts, and gives no hint about what the session fix would be. Fix: make the message self-explanatory, e.g. 'no primaryAccounts entry for urn:ietf:params:jmap:chat'.
